channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog foul bag left in alley way, 29th March
item.description:
Ongoing problem, someone keeps leaving dog waste on the alleyway the public walk along

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Caygill Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Needs repainting, 29th March
item.description:
Road marking needs repainting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Cycleway road markings no longer visible need repainting, 29th March
item.description:
Cycleway road markings no longer visible need repainting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle lane white road markings have been obscured by new tarmac being laid over it. Road markings for cycle lane need repainting as this cycle lane serves BETHS School and Bexley Village., 29th March
item.description:
Cycle lane white road markings have been obscured by new tarmac being laid over it. Road markings for cycle lane need repainting as this cycle lane serves BETHS School and Bexley Village.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: My drain was blocked by Tree roots that were very large., 29th March
item.description:
I had to get my drain unblocked on my front drive yesterday that were blocked up by thick tree roots at a large cost to me . The engineer said it would be a damaged pipe further up the road damaged by a tree and the roots coming down to my drainage on my property. I paid for the drain to be de-rooted as well but he said the roots get much bigger further down the line and he could only go so far and he said the roots were larger further down. I live at 44 Bull Close chafford hundred grays

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bull Close, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight SBP3341 on during daylight hours, 29th March
item.description:
Streetlight SBP3341 on during daylight hours this has been happening for a few weeks now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup By-pass, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Perry St. Hazardous uneven road surface due to series of potholes and subsidence, 29th March
item.description:
Perry St. Hazardous uneven road surface due to series of potholes and subsidence been here for two months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Perry Street Chislehurst 5 foot long x 5" deep pothole, 29th March
item.description:
5 foot long x 5" deep pothole
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London

item.title: Yet another abandoned untasted car on Polebrook Road, 29th March
item.description:
This car is untaxed and parked up on the street for months there are 4 cars in this area in the area with same issue

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Polebrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hoarding vandalism, 29th March

item.title: Lots of rubbish dumped on corner of St Kildas and Heathland Road N16, 29th March
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heathland Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Graffiti Block 2 Devon Mansions, 29th March
item.description:
Reported previously and wrongly marked as “fixed” Graffiti on the bottom of the entrance door block 2 Devon Mansions Tooley Street SE1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15-28, Tooley Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New pathway light, 29th March
item.description:
Why on earth have the street lights been changed around the back of Montague square along the walkway? They don't give out hardly any light. This is not a safe place to walk down even in daylight
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montague Square, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three large bags of domestic rubbish in the usual spot on Lassell Street/Orlop street corner, 29th March
item.description:
Think these were dumped 28/3. The foxes and pigeons have split the bags so food waste and rubbish all over the street. I’d be grateful if they could be removed and the litter cleared as a matter of urgency. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 29th March
item.description:
Near block 110-124, crescent House Remove graffiti from salt box

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coldbath Street, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes, 29th March
item.description:
Large potholes along the centre of the road 5 foot long and ovar 1 foot wide!!! Can’t photo them, too dangerous!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
